name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Component Object Model Hijacking Rules
notes: This Building Block detects Component Object Model (COM) hijacking activity by monitoring registry modifications on Windows Tooltip handler, keys that contain the application to establish Dynamic Data Exchange (DDE) conversation, and keys that contain the path of a Dynamic Link Library (DLL).
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Component Object Model Hijacking Rules on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification
when the event matches Rule Name (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches Rule Name (custom) contains any of T1122
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Component Object Model Hijacking Rules on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification
AND when the event matches Rule Name (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches Rule Name (custom) contains any of T1122
